title: Submit job to printer
given: a job file
when: the operator submits the job file using Submission method
then: the printer appends a new controller job to the scheduled jobs AND the controller job is of type Job type

title: Complete printing moves job to printed
given: a controller job is in the scheduled jobs AND the controller job is a production job
when: the printer starts printing the controller job AND the printer completes printing the controller job
then: the controller job is in the printed jobs

title: Restart cleanup
given: the printer controller is running
when: the operator restarts the printer controller
then: the printed jobs clean up is executed

title: Pause printing
given: a controller job is printing
when: the operator pauses the printing of the controller job
then: the controller job is paused

title: Resume paused job
given: a controller job is paused
when: the operator resumes printing the controller job
then: the controller job is printing

title: Move paused job to waiting
given: a controller job is paused
when: the operator moves the controller job to the waiting jobs before the printer completes printing
then: the controller job is in the waiting jobs AND the controller job is not in the printed jobs

title: Move from waiting to scheduled
given: a controller job in the waiting jobs
when: the operator moves the controller job to the scheduled jobs
then: the controller job is in the scheduled jobs

title: Hard copy output after printing
given: a controller job is in the scheduled jobs
when: the printer starts printing the controller job AND the printer completes printing the controller job
then: there is a printed output AND the printed output is a hard copy of the controller job

title: Add two numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 5 and 7 and choose addition
then: the calculator displays the result as 12

title: Subtract two numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 10 and 3 and choose subtraction
then: the calculator displays the result as 7

title: Multiply two numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 4 and 6 and choose multiplication
then: the calculator displays the result as 24

title: Divide two numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 20 and 4 and choose division
then: the calculator displays the result as 5

title: Add three numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the number 5 and add 3 and then add 2
then: the calculator displays the result as 10

title: Calculate percentage
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the number 80 and calculate 25 percent
then: the calculator displays the result as 20

title: Square a number
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the number 9 and choose square operation
then: the calculator displays the result as 81

title: Calculate square root
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the number 16 and choose square root operation
then: the calculator displays the result as 4

title: Chain operations add and multiply
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter 5 add 3 and then multiply by 2
then: the calculator displays the result as 16

title: Calculate average of two numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 8 and 12 and choose average
then: the calculator displays the result as 10

title: Clear and add
given: the calculator displays 42
when: I clear the calculator and then enter 7 and add 3
then: the calculator displays the result as 10

title: Add negative numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers -5 and -3 and choose addition
then: the calculator displays the result as -8

title: Subtract with negative result
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 5 and 12 and choose subtraction
then: the calculator displays the result as -7

title: Add decimal numbers
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 3.5 and 2.7 and choose addition
then: the calculator displays the result as 6.2

title: Multiply by zero
given: the calculator is ready for use
when: I enter the numbers 25 and 0 and choose multiplication
then: the calculator displays the result as 0

title: Cancel job during printing
given: a controller job is printing
when: the operator cancels the controller job
then: the controller job is removed from scheduled jobs AND the controller job is not in printed jobs AND the printer stops printing

title: Handle paper jam during production
given: a production job is printing AND the printer has sufficient paper
when: a paper jam occurs AND the operator clears the paper jam AND the operator resumes printing
then: the controller job continues printing from the last successful page

title: Priority job jumps queue
given: there are 3 jobs in the scheduled jobs
when: the operator submits a high priority job AND marks it as urgent
then: the high priority job is inserted at the beginning of scheduled jobs

title: Concurrent pause requests
given: a controller job is printing
when: two operators attempt to pause the same controller job simultaneously
then: the controller job is paused only once AND both operators receive confirmation

title: Auto-cleanup old printed jobs
given: there are 50 jobs in printed jobs AND printed jobs are older than 30 days
when: the scheduled cleanup task runs
then: jobs older than 30 days are removed from printed jobs AND recent jobs remain

title: Resume printing after power failure
given: a controller job is printing at page 45 of 100
when: a power failure occurs AND the printer restarts AND the operator resumes the controller job
then: the controller job continues printing from page 45

title: Duplicate job submission detection
given: a job file with checksum ABC123 is in scheduled jobs
when: the operator submits the same job file with checksum ABC123
then: the printer rejects the duplicate AND displays a warning message

title: Batch print multiple jobs
given: there are 10 jobs in scheduled jobs
when: the operator starts batch printing AND the printer completes all 10 jobs
then: all 10 jobs are in printed jobs AND the printer is idle

title: Emergency stop during printing
given: a controller job is printing at 50% completion
when: the operator presses the emergency stop button
then: the printer immediately stops printing AND the controller job is moved to paused state AND no additional pages are printed

title: Transfer funds between accounts
given: account A has balance 1000 AND account B has balance 500
when: the customer transfers 300 from account A to account B
then: account A has balance 700 AND account B has balance 800 AND a transaction record is created

title: Concurrent withdrawal attempts
given: an account has balance 100
when: two withdrawal requests for 80 are processed simultaneously
then: only one withdrawal succeeds AND the account has balance 20 AND the other withdrawal is rejected

title: Overdraft protection activation
given: an account has balance 50 AND overdraft limit 200
when: the customer attempts to withdraw 150
then: the withdrawal succeeds AND the account balance is -100 AND overdraft fees are applied

title: Failed transfer rollback
given: account A has balance 1000 AND account B exists
when: a transfer of 500 from account A to account B is initiated AND the transfer fails after debiting account A
then: account A is restored to balance 1000 AND account B remains unchanged AND an error is logged

title: Detect fraudulent transaction pattern
given: an account had 3 transactions in the last hour from different countries
when: a fourth transaction is attempted from another country
then: the transaction is flagged for review AND the account is temporarily locked AND the customer is notified

title: Schedule recurring payment
given: an account has sufficient balance
when: the customer schedules a monthly payment of 200 starting next month
then: a recurring payment is created AND the payment executes on the scheduled date each month

title: Insufficient funds for scheduled payment
given: a recurring payment of 500 is scheduled AND the account has balance 300
when: the payment date arrives
then: the payment fails AND the customer is notified AND a retry is scheduled

title: Reverse completed transaction
given: a transaction of 250 was completed 2 hours ago
when: the customer disputes the transaction AND the dispute is approved
then: the transaction is reversed AND the account balance is restored AND both parties are notified

title: Place order with insufficient stock
given: product X has 5 units in stock
when: a customer orders 10 units of product X
then: the order is partially fulfilled with 5 units AND the remaining 5 units are backordered

title: Apply discount code after cart modification
given: a cart has 3 items totaling 150 AND a discount code for 20% is applied
when: the customer adds another item worth 50 AND proceeds to checkout
then: the discount applies to the new total of 200 AND the final price is 160

title: Handle expired discount during checkout
given: a cart has a discount code applied that expires in 5 minutes
when: the customer completes checkout 10 minutes later
then: the discount is removed AND the customer is notified AND charged the full price

title: Concurrent purchases of last item
given: product Y has 1 unit in stock
when: two customers attempt to purchase product Y simultaneously
then: only one order succeeds AND the other customer is notified that the item is out of stock

title: Cancel order after partial shipment
given: an order with 3 items has 1 item already shipped
when: the customer cancels the order
then: the 2 unshipped items are cancelled AND the shipped item cannot be cancelled AND a partial refund is processed

title: Return damaged item past return window
given: a customer purchased an item 35 days ago AND the return window is 30 days
when: the customer reports the item as defective with proof
then: an exception is created AND the return is approved AND a refund or replacement is offered

title: Dynamic pricing based on demand
given: product Z has high demand with 100 views in the last hour
when: another customer views product Z
then: the price may increase based on demand algorithm AND the customer sees the updated price

title: Abandoned cart recovery
given: a customer added items to cart 3 days ago but did not checkout
when: the automated recovery system runs
then: the customer receives a reminder email AND a special discount code is offered

title: Split payment across multiple methods
given: an order total is 500
when: the customer pays 200 with a gift card AND 300 with a credit card
then: both payments are processed AND the order is confirmed

title: Schedule appointment with doctor availability conflict
given: doctor A has appointments at 10:00 and 11:00
when: a patient requests an appointment at 10:30
then: the system suggests alternative times AND the appointment is not scheduled

title: Prescribe medication with allergy warning
given: a patient has a documented allergy to penicillin
when: a doctor prescribes amoxicillin (a penicillin derivative)
then: the system displays a critical allergy warning AND the prescription is blocked until acknowledged

title: Access patient records with privacy restrictions
given: a patient has flagged their records as sensitive
when: a nurse attempts to access the patient records
then: access is logged AND requires additional authentication AND the patient may be notified

title: Emergency override of scheduled procedures
given: an operating room is scheduled for a routine surgery at 14:00
when: an emergency case arrives at 13:45
then: the routine surgery is rescheduled AND the emergency case takes priority AND affected parties are notified

title: Conflicting diagnoses from multiple doctors
given: doctor A diagnosed condition X AND doctor B diagnosed condition Y for the same symptoms
when: the patient requests a third opinion
then: a specialist consultation is scheduled AND both previous diagnoses are made available

title: Medication interaction detection
given: a patient is taking medication A
when: a doctor prescribes medication B that interacts with medication A
then: the system alerts about the interaction AND suggests alternatives
